report_name: New 'GopherWhisper' APT Group Linked to China Targets Mongolian Government

threat_actors.name: GopherWhisper
threat_actors.description: A previously unknown, China-aligned APT group focused on cyber-espionage, active since at least November 2023. The group targets governmental institutions, notably in Mongolia, using a custom Go-based malware toolkit that abuses legitimate commercial services (Slack, Discord, Microsoft 365) for C2 communications.

attack_patterns.name: Web Service
attack_patterns.description: The GopherWhisper group extensively uses legitimate commercial web services, including Slack, Discord, and Microsoft Graph API, for command and control to evade detection.

attack_patterns.name: Dead Drop Resolver
attack_patterns.description: The BoxOfFriends backdoor uses an Outlook account as a dead-drop resolver, creating, reading, and deleting draft emails to pass commands and exfiltrated data via the Microsoft Graph API.

attack_patterns.name: Exfiltration to Cloud Storage
attack_patterns.description: The CompactGopher tool exfiltrates stolen data by uploading it to the legitimate file-sharing service file.io.

attack_patterns.name: Application Layer Protocol
attack_patterns.description: The malware toolkit communicates over standard web protocols (HTTPS) to interact with the APIs of Slack, Discord, and Microsoft 365, blending C2 traffic with legitimate activity.

malware.name: LaxGopher
malware.description: A Go-based backdoor that uses the Slack API to post messages with exfiltrated data to a private channel and read new messages for commands.

malware.name: RatGopher
malware.description: A Go-based backdoor that uses Discord API and webhooks for command and control.

malware.name: BoxOfFriends
malware.description: A Go-based backdoor that uses the Microsoft Graph API to create, read, and delete draft emails in a compromised Outlook account for C2 communications.

malware.name: JabGopher
malware.description: An injector component of the GopherWhisper toolkit.

malware.name: FriendDelivery
malware.description: A loader component of the GopherWhisper toolkit, responsible for deploying one of the backdoors.

malware.name: CompactGopher
malware.description: An exfiltration tool component of the GopherWhisper toolkit, used to exfiltrate stolen data via the file.io service.

tools.name: Slack
tools.description: The legitimate Slack service and its API were abused by the LaxGopher backdoor for command and control.

tools.name: Discord
tools.description: The legitimate Discord service and its API/webhooks were abused by the RatGopher backdoor for command and control.

tools.name: Microsoft 365
tools.description: The legitimate Microsoft 365 service, specifically Outlook and the Graph API, were abused by the BoxOfFriends backdoor for C2 via email drafts.

tools.name: file.io
tools.description: The legitimate file.io file-sharing service was abused by the CompactGopher tool for data exfiltration.

identities.name: Mongolian governmental institution
identities.description: A government institution in Mongolia targeted by the GopherWhisper APT group in a cyber-espionage campaign discovered in January 2025.

infrastructure.name: GopherWhisper Slack C2 Workspace
infrastructure.description: A private Slack workspace used by the LaxGopher backdoor for C2 communications.

infrastructure.name: GopherWhisper Discord C2 Channel
infrastructure.description: A Discord channel and webhooks used by the RatGopher backdoor for C2 communications.

infrastructure.name: GopherWhisper Outlook C2 Mailbox
infrastructure.description: A compromised Outlook mailbox used by the BoxOfFriends backdoor for C2 via email drafts.

infrastructure.name: GopherWhisper file.io Exfiltration Channel
infrastructure.description: The file.io service used by the CompactGopher tool to exfiltrate stolen data.

indicators.name: GopherWhisper C2 via Slack API
indicators.pattern:
title: GopherWhisper C2 via Slack API
id: 2b8f1c9a-7d3e-4b1f-8c9a-3d1e2f3a4b5c
status: experimental
description: Detects an unusual or unauthorized process making API calls to post messages to Slack, a TTP used by the LaxGopher backdoor.
references:
  - https://www.welivesecurity.com/en/eset-research/gopherwhisper-burrow-full-malware/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-04-24
tags:
  - attack.t1102
  - attack.command_and_control
level: medium
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection:
    c-uri|contains: '/api/chat.postMessage'
    cs-host|endswith: 'slack.com'
  filter:
    c-useragent|contains:
      - 'Mozilla/'
      - 'Chrome/'
      - 'Edge/'
      - 'Safari/'
  condition: selection and not filter
indicators.description: Detects suspicious API calls to Slack used for C2 by the LaxGopher backdoor.

indicators.name: GopherWhisper C2 via Discord Webhook
indicators.pattern:
title: GopherWhisper C2 via Discord Webhook
id: 8c9a3d1e-2f3a-4b5c-6d7e-8f9a0b1c2d3e
status: experimental
description: Detects an unusual or unauthorized process making API calls to Discord webhooks, a TTP used by the RatGopher backdoor.
references:
  - https://www.welivesecurity.com/en/eset-research/gopherwhisper-burrow-full-malware/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-04-24
tags:
  - attack.t1102
  - attack.command_and_control
level: medium
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection:
    c-uri|contains: '/api/webhooks/'
    cs-host|endswith: 'discord.com'
  filter:
    c-useragent|contains:
      - 'Mozilla/'
      - 'Chrome/'
      - 'Edge/'
      - 'Safari/'
  condition: selection and not filter
indicators.description: Detects suspicious API calls to Discord webhooks used for C2 by the RatGopher backdoor.

indicators.name: GopherWhisper C2 via Outlook Drafts (Graph API)
indicators.pattern:
title: GopherWhisper C2 via Outlook Drafts (Graph API)
id: 4b5c6d7e-8f9a-0b1c-2d3e-4f5a6b7c8d9e
status: experimental
description: Detects an unusual process accessing Outlook draft messages via the Microsoft Graph API, a TTP used by the BoxOfFriends backdoor.
references:
  - https://www.welivesecurity.com/en/eset-research/gopherwhisper-burrow-full-malware/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-04-24
tags:
  - attack.t1102.003
  - attack.command_and_control
level: medium
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection:
    c-uri|contains: '/v1.0/me/mailFolders/drafts/messages'
    cs-host|endswith: 'graph.microsoft.com'
  filter:
    c-useragent|contains:
      - 'Mozilla/'
      - 'Chrome/'
      - 'Edge/'
      - 'Safari/'
  condition: selection and not filter
indicators.description: Detects suspicious Microsoft Graph API access to Outlook drafts, a C2 method used by the BoxOfFriends backdoor.

indicators.name: Suspicious Go HTTP Client User Agent
indicators.pattern:
title: Suspicious Go HTTP Client User Agent
id: 0b1c2d3e-4f5a-6b7c-8d9e-0f1a2b3c4d5e
status: experimental
description: Detects the default user agent for Go-lang's HTTP client. While not inherently malicious, its presence from an unexpected process could indicate a Go-based backdoor like those used by GopherWhisper.
references:
  - https://www.welivesecurity.com/en/eset-research/gopherwhisper-burrow-full-malware/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-04-24
tags:
  - attack.t1071.001
  - attack.command_and_control
level: low
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection:
    c-useragent: 'Go-http-client/1.1'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the default Go-lang HTTP client user agent, which is characteristic of the GopherWhisper malware toolkit.

relationships.source_name: GopherWhisper C2 via Outlook Drafts (Graph API)
Suspicious Go HTTP Client User Agent
